Services.title: Our Services

Portfolio.title: Our Portfolio
Portfolio.subtitle: Projects that speak for themselves
Portfolio.project1_desc: Complete inventory management system with invoicing, quotes, purchase orders and supplier tracking. Built with Laravel.
Portfolio.project2_desc: School administration platform managing students, teachers, classes, subjects and rooms with role-based access control.
Portfolio.project3_desc: Car rental platform with booking system, user authentication and fleet management.
Portfolio.project4_desc: Showcase website for a web agency presenting services, projects and technical expertise with responsive design.
Portfolio.project5_desc: Multi-section website for a sports organization featuring events, gallery, contact and multilingual support.
Portfolio.project6_desc: WordPress plugin displaying live football match results and scores with user authentication.
Portfolio.project7_desc: Premium portfolio website for an architecture and interior design studio featuring project showcases, design philosophy and client testimonials.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: A local agency, global expertise
About.story_p1: Based in the heart of Marrakech, Ibda3 Digital was born from a passion for digital and a belief: every business deserves an online presence that matches its ambition.
About.story_p2: We combine creativity, technical expertise and local market knowledge to deliver digital solutions that make a difference.
About.why1_desc: Based in Marrakech, we meet our clients in person to understand their needs.
About.why2_desc: Clean code, modern design and optimal performance — we don't compromise.
About.why3_desc: From design to launch and beyond, we're by your side every step of the way.
About.why4_desc: Rates adapted to the Moroccan market, without sacrificing quality.
